ques: Check out the NHL Standings 2025-26 on ESPN to see which teams are at the top and which are at the bottom in Eastern and Western Conference. What about the situation in Division.
answer: NHL 2025-26 standings — EAST: top = Carolina Hurricanes (113 pts, best record in conference), bottom = New York Rangers. WEST: top = Colorado Avalanche (121 pts, best record in the NHL), bottom = Vancouver Canucks. By DIVISION — Atlantic: 1st Buffalo Sabres, last Toronto Maple Leafs; Metropolitan: 1st Carolina Hurricanes, last NY Rangers; Central: 1st Colorado Avalanche, last Chicago Blackhawks; Pacific: 1st Vegas Golden Knights, last Vancouver Canucks.
